{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Valinhall gatecrawler
| introduced = The Crimson Vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Valinhall gatecrawler]] is a device that can tear closing or recently closed [[Gates]] back open.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c4">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate artifacts]]
